reference: Hello sir, I am Deepak, twenty-five years old. Due to the mistakes of my childhood with masturbation, I have lost my bodily power, ability for sexual activity, my penis has become short and bent, my muscles are too weak, and the semen mixes with urine. I feel very lazy. Because of this, sometimes I think about suicide. Please suggest to me which therapy can solve my problem economically.
text: Hello, sir. I am Deepak, 25 years old. Due to the mistakes of my childhood with masturbation, I have lost my bodily power, ability for sexual activity, my penis has become short and bent, my muscles are too weak, and the semen mixes with urine. I feel very lazy. Sometimes I think about suicide. Please suggest to me which therapy can solve my problem economically.
